name: vault-organizer
description: Classify, de-duplicate, and organize Obsidian vault notes from a schema note with restart-safe runs.

tools.name: vault_organizer
tools.description: Classify Obsidian notes against the vault schema, de-duplicate exact and near-duplicate notes into a recoverable quarantine, produce a dry-run plan, and apply approved frontmatter/move changes; runs are resumable with --run and inspectable with status/doctor.
